title: Senior Software Engineer - DRDO - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - DRDO - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DRDO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About DRDO:
DRDO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO!
